        +getName() String
    }
    Person --> BankAccount : owns

    ClassO .. ClassP

name: gf-flowchart-bt-nested-subgraphs
src:
flowchart BT
    c1 --> a2
    subgraph one [First Group]
        a1 --> a2
        subgraph inner ["Inner Group"]
            n1 --> n2
        end
    end
    subgraph two
        b1 --> b2
    end
    one --> two

name: gf-flowchart-styling-click-classdef-linkstyle
src:
flowchart LR
    A[Start] --> B[Middle] --> C[End]
    click A href "https://mermaid.js.org" "Open docs"
    classDef important fill:#f96,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px;
    class A,B important
    style C fill:#bbf,stroke:#f66,stroke-width:2px
    linkStyle 0 stroke:#ff3,stroke-width:4px;

name: gf-flowchart-td-all-classic-shapes
src:
flowchart TD
    A[Rectangle] --> B(Round)
    B --> C([Stadium])
    C --> D[[Subroutine]]
    D --> E[(Database)]
    E --> F((Circle))
    F --> G>Asymmetric]
    G --> H{Rhombus}
    H --> I{{Hexagon}}
    I --> J[/Parallelogram/]
    J --> K[\Parallelogram Alt\]
    K --> L[/Trapezoid\]
    L --> M[\Trapezoid Alt/]
    M --> N(((Double Circle)))

name: gf-flowchart-td-decision-loop-long-links
src:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B{Is it?}
    B -->|Yes| C[OK]
    C --> D[Rethink]
    D --> B
    B ---->|No| E[End]

name: gf-graph-lr-edge-types
src:
graph LR
    A --> B
    B --- C
    C -.-> D
    D ==> E
    E ~~~ F
    F --o G
    G --x H
    H <--> I

name: gf-graph-tb-multidirectional-and-chaining
src:
graph TB
    A o--o B
    B <--> C
    C x--x D
    A & B --> C & D
    E -- text --> F -- text2 --> G

name: gf-state-basic-transitions
src:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Still
    Still --> [*]
    Still --> Moving : begin
    Moving --> Still : halt
    Moving --> Crash : collide
    Crash --> [*]

name: gf-state-choice
src:
stateDiagram-v2
    state if_state <<choice>>
    [*] --> IsPositive
    IsPositive --> if_state
    if_state --> False : if n < 0
    if_state --> True : if n >= 0

name: gf-state-composite-nested
gf-state-concurrency
src:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Active
    state Active {
        [*] --> NumLockOff
        NumLockOff --> NumLockOn : EvNumLockPressed
        NumLockOn --> NumLockOff : EvNumLockPressed
        --
        [*] --> CapsLockOff
        CapsLockOff --> CapsLockOn : EvCapsLockPressed
        CapsLockOn --> CapsLockOff : EvCapsLockPressed
    }

name: gf-state-fork-join
src:
stateDiagram-v2
    state fork_state <<fork>>
    [*] --> fork_state
    fork_state --> State2
    fork_state --> State3
    state join_state <<join>>
    State2 --> join_state
    State3 --> join_state
    join_state --> State4
    State4 --> [*]

name: gf-state-invalid-bad-arrow
src:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> A
    A ==> B
    B --> [*]

name: gf-state-notes-direction
src:
stateDiagram-v2
    direction LR
    State1 : The state with a note
    note right of State1
        Important information! You can write
        notes.
    end note
    State1 --> State2
    note left of State2 : This is the note to the left.

name: gf-state-styling-classdef
src:
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    classDef notMoving fill:white
    classDef movement font-style:italic
    classDef badBadEvent fill:#f00,color:white,font-weight:bold
    [*] --> Still:::notMoving
    Still --> [*]
    Still --> Moving:::movement
    Moving --> Crash:::movement
    Crash:::badBadEvent --> [*]

name: gitgraph-basic
src:
gitGraph
  commit
  branch dev
  commit
  checkout main
  merge dev

name: go-architecture-cross-group-edges
src:
architecture-beta
    group public(cloud)[Public Tier]
    group private(cloud)[Private Tier]
    service gateway(internet)[Gateway] in public
    service worker(server)[Worker] in private
    service database(database)[Primary DB] in private
    gateway{group}:R --> L:worker{group}
    worker:B --> T:database

name: go-architecture-grouped-services
src:
architecture-beta
    group api(cloud)[API]
    service db(database)[Database] in api
    service disk(disk)[Storage] in api
    service server(server)[Application Server] in api
    db:L -- R:server
    disk:T -- B:server

name: go-block-composite-columns
src:
block-beta
    columns 3
    source["Source"]
    block:core:2
        columns 2
        parse["Parse"] validate["Validate"]
        transform["Transform"] emit["Emit"]
    end
    source --> core
    sink[("Archive")]
    core --> sink

name: go-block-grid-with-arrow
src:
block-beta
    columns 3
    input["Input"] space output["Output"]
    parser("Parser") validator{{"Validator"}} store[("Store")]
    input --> parser
    parser --> validator
    validator --> store
    store --> output

name: go-c4-container-order-platform
src:
C4Container
    title Order Platform Containers
    Person(user, "Store User", "Places orders")
    Container_Boundary(platform, "Order Platform") {
        Container(web, "Web Application", "TypeScript", "Serves the user interface")
        Container(api, "Order API", "Java", "Processes orders")
        ContainerDb(db, "Order Database", "PostgreSQL", "Stores orders")
    }
    System_Ext(mail, "Mail Service", "Sends confirmations")
    Rel(user, web, "Uses", "HTTPS")
    Rel(web, api, "Calls", "JSON/HTTPS")
    Rel(api, db, "Reads and writes", "SQL")
    Rel(api, mail, "Sends messages", "SMTP")

name: go-c4-context-shop-system
src:
C4Context
    title Online Shop System Context
    Person(customer, "Customer", "Browses and buys products")
    System_Boundary(shop_boundary, "Online Shop") {
        System(shop, "Shopping System", "Handles catalogue and orders")
        SystemDb(catalogue, "Catalogue Database", "Stores product information")
    }
    System_Ext(payment, "Payment Provider", "Processes card payments")
    Rel(customer, shop, "Uses", "HTTPS")
    Rel(shop, catalogue, "Reads and writes")
    Rel(shop, payment, "Requests payment", "JSON/HTTPS")

name: go-er-aliases-nullable-attributes
src:
erDiagram
    direction LR
    person[Person] ||--o{ address["Postal Address"] : uses
    person {
        int id PK
        string first_name
        string? middle_name "nullable in v11.16"
        string last_name
    }
    address {
        int id PK
        int person_id FK
        string postcode UK "delivery area code"
    }

name: go-er-cardinality-and-identification
src:
erDiagram
    USER ||--o| PROFILE : has
    ORGANIZATION ||--|{ TEAM : contains
    TEAM }o--|| ORGANIZATION : belongs_to
    PERSON }|..|{ CAR : drives
    ACCOUNT |o..o{ SESSION : opens
    COUNTRY ||--|| CAPITAL : designates

name: go-er-commerce-keys-comments
go-gantt-clock-milestones
src:
gantt
    title Maintenance window
    dateFormat HH:mm
    axisFormat %H:%M
    Initial checkpoint :milestone, m1, 09:00, 0m
    Database backup :done, backup, after m1, 30m
    Upgrade :crit, active, upgrade, after backup, 90m
    Validation :after upgrade, 20m
    Final checkpoint :milestone, m2, 11:20, 0m

name: go-gantt-excludes-status-milestone
src:
gantt
    title Winter release
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    axisFormat %Y-%m-%d
    excludes weekends
    excludes 2026-01-19
    section Engineering
    Specification :done, spec, 2026-01-12, 3d
    Critical implementation :crit, active, impl, after spec, 5d
    Regression tests :crit, test, after impl, 3d
    section Release
    Version 2.0 :milestone, rel, after test, 0d

name: go-gantt-sections-after-dependencies
src:
gantt
    title Product launch
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    axisFormat %b %d
    section Planning
    Requirements :done, req, 2026-01-05, 4d
    Design :active, design, after req, 5d
    section Delivery
    Build :build, after design, 8d
    Test :test, after build, 4d
    Deploy :after test, 1d

name: go-gitgraph-branch-types-switch
src:
gitGraph LR
    commit id: "A"
    branch experiment
    commit id: "B" type: REVERSE
    switch main
    commit id: "C" type: HIGHLIGHT
    checkout experiment
    commit id: "D" tag: "prototype"
    checkout main
    merge experiment

name: go-gitgraph-cherry-pick
src:
gitGraph

    branch develop
    commit id: "FEATURE"
    checkout main
    commit id: "MAIN-WORK"
    cherry-pick id: "FEATURE"
    commit id: "SHIPPED" tag: "v2.1"

name: go-gitgraph-feature-merge-tag
src:
gitGraph
    commit id: "root"
    commit id: "setup"
    branch feature
    commit id: "feature-1"
    checkout main
    commit id: "hotfix"
    merge feature id: "merge-feature" tag: "v1.0.0"
    commit id: "release" type: HIGHLIGHT

      Compare products: 3: Shopper, Partner
    section Purchase

      Pay for order: 2: Shopper, Payment Service

name: go-journey-support-resolution
src:
journey

    section Report problem
      Open ticket: 3: Customer
      Add diagnostics: 2: Customer, Support Agent
    section Resolution
      Investigate issue: 4: Support Agent, Engineer
      Confirm fix: 5: Customer, Support Agent

name: go-packet-auto-bit-counts
src:
packet-beta
    title Compact Message
    +1: "Ready"
    +3: "Priority"
    +4: "Opcode"
